# Christian Counsellors Near L5A 4E6 (Mississauga, Ontario)

A directory of 100 Christian counsellors, therapists, and faith-based counselling practices serving Mississauga and the Greater Toronto Area. Most offer in-person sessions in Mississauga and/or virtual sessions across Ontario.

**Source notes:** Listings compiled from Psychology Today's Christian Therapists directory for Mississauga and established faith-based counselling centres serving the GTA. Profile pages include full credentials, specialties, fees, insurance coverage, and booking links. Please verify phone numbers before calling — some practitioners use intake-line redirects that may change.

**Last updated:** April 19, 2026

---

## Established Christian Counselling Centres (Bonus References)

These are practices specifically positioned as Christian/faith-based counselling centres serving the Mississauga/GTA area. Most have multiple therapists on staff.

| Organization | Phone | Website |
|--------------|-------|---------|
| Pathways Counselling Centre (Mississauga) | See website | https://pathwayscounsellingcentre.com/christian-counselling-mississauga/ |
| Emerge Christian Counselling Centre | See website | https://emergecounselling.ca/ |
| The Family Enhancement Centre (TFEC) | See website | https://www.tfec.ca/christian-counselling |
| Meristem Counselling (Oakville/Mississauga) | (416) 436-3470 | https://www.theravive.com/cities/on/christian-counselling-mississauga.aspx |
| Seasons of Hope Psychotherapy | See website | https://seasonsofhopepsych.com/christian-counselling |
| Jamie Clahane (By The Rivers) | See website | https://www.bytherivers.ca/ |
| Shalem Mental Health Network | See website | https://shalemnetwork.org/ |
| Focus on the Family Canada — Counsellor Referral | 1-800-661-9800 | https://www.focusonthefamily.ca/content/counselling |

---

## Notes & Caveats

- **Verification recommended.** Phone numbers shown route through Psychology Today's intake system for most practitioners and may change. Always confirm via the profile URL.
- **Location disclosure.** Several counsellors are listed as "Online Only" or "Serves Area" — they accept Ontario clients virtually but may not have a Mississauga office.
- **Faith integration varies.** Some counsellors integrate Christian faith directly into therapy; others are Christian themselves but offer secular/evidence-based therapy unless a client specifically requests faith integration.
- **Insurance.** Most listed practitioners accept major Canadian insurers (Sun Life, Manulife, Canada Life, Green Shield, etc.). Confirm coverage before booking.
- **Postal code note.** L5A 4E6 is in central Mississauga (Cooksville/Mississauga Valley area). All Mississauga-listed practitioners are within a reasonable drive; GTA practitioners offer online sessions.

---

*Compiled from Psychology Today Canada (psychologytoday.com/ca), Theravive, TherapyTribe, and individual practice websites.*
